text:
Name:
Ardi Pratama

Summary:
Software Engineer with experience in backend development, automation, and machine learning projects. Skilled in building REST APIs, processing data, and developing scalable Python applications.

Skills:
- Python, C++, SQL
- FastAPI, Flask
- Pandas, NumPy
- scikit-learn
- Git, Linux

Experience:
Backend Developer Intern
- Built REST APIs using FastAPI
- Developed data processing endpoints
- Added logging and error handling systems

Projects:
AI Resume Screening System
- Developed semantic matching between CV and job requirements
- Built vector-based retrieval workflow

Automation Pipeline
- Automated CSV and JSON data processing
- Reduced manual data cleaning effort

Education:
Bachelor of Electrical Engineering

Additional Information:
Interested in backend engineering, AI systems, and software architecture.
